```html NEAR YOU NEWS

NearYouNews

A location-based news application built with React Native (Expo) and Node.js/Express backend.

Features

  • Location-based news feed
  • Post news with current location
  • Filter news by radius (1-50km) and sort by distance/time
  • Dark/Light theme toggle
  • Auto-update location every 2 minutes
  • Permission management for location access

Setup Instructions

Backend Setup

  1. Navigate to the backend directory:
    2. cd backend
  2. Install dependencies:
    3. npm install
  3. Create `.env` file from `.env.example`: 
    4. cp .env.example .env
  4. Update `.env` with your configuration:
    5. PORT=5000 MONGO_URI=your_mongodb_connection_string NODE_ENV=development
  5. Start the backend server:
    6. npm start

Frontend Setup

  1. Navigate to the mobile app directory:
    2. cd nearby-news
  2. Install dependencies:
    3. npm install
  3. Create `.env` file from `.env.example`: 
    4. cp .env.example .env
  4. Update `.env` with your API configuration:
    5. API_BASE_URL=http://your-local-ip:5000/api/v1 APP_NAME=NearYouNews DEFAULT_RADIUS=5000 UPDATE_INTERVAL=120000
  5. Start the Expo development server:
    6. npm start

Environment Variables

Deployment Notes

Project Structure

nearyounews/
├── backend/
│   ├── config/
│   ├── controllers/
│   ├── models/
│   ├── routes/
│   ├── .env
│   ├── .env.example
│   └── index.js
└── nearby-news/
    ├── components/
    ├── context/
    ├── screens/
    ├── services/
    ├── .env
    ├── .env.example
    ├── config.js
    └── App.js
```
